narrative:
Precinct Sylvania Township F (precinct in Lucas County) has 1,222 registered voters, with 55.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.8%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.6 percentage points.
